question_text: Worst headache of life or sudden thunderclap onset?
Headache started suddenly (max intensity within 1 minute)?
New weakness numbness or facial droop?
Confusion or new mental status change?
Age 50+ with new or different headache?
Headache with eye pain/red eye or halos?
Headache wakes you from sleep or worse when lying down?
Severe vomiting or cannot keep fluids down?
One-sided weakness numbness or facial droop?
Confusion or new mental status change?
Severe neck/back pain or new bladder/bowel issues?
New severe numbness in groin/saddle area?
Age 60+ or history of stroke/TIA/atrial fibrillation?
Symptoms improving within an hour (possible TIA)?
Severe shortness of breath or chest pain?
Still confused or not back to normal now?
Trouble breathing or turning blue during/after episode?
Low blood sugar risk (diabetes/insulin) or could be hypoglycemia?
New medication or missed seizure meds?
Persistent vomiting or cannot keep fluids down?
Severe weakness or unable to walk?
